marketplace at the edge of the old quarter
throne room, dust on the steps
harbor warehouse, tide marks on the walls
forest clearing with a ring of burned stones
mountain pass, snow thinning on the rocks
temple courtyard, incense smoke hanging low
river mouth where the salt meets fresh water
ruined library, open to the weather
underground cistern lit by a shaft of daylight
walled garden behind a collapsed palace
fishing village at the end of the road
abandoned mining town, one bar still open
rooftop terrace overlooking the lower city
